# Midland Laptop Repairs

> Local laptop repair specialists based in Midland, Perth, Western Australia. Part of Midland Computers. Same-day repairs, honest pricing, real warranty on every job.

## Business Info

- Name: Midland Laptop Repairs (trading as Midland Computers)
- Phone: (08) 6266 8370
- Address: Unit 8, 245 Great Eastern Highway, Midland WA 6056
- Hours: Mon–Fri 8:30 AM – 5:00 PM · Saturday 10:30 AM – 3:00 PM · Sunday Closed
- Rating: 4.9/5 · 500+ Google reviews
- Website: https://www.midlandlaptoprepairs.com.au/

## Services

- Laptop Screen Replacement — cracked, flickering or dead screens replaced same-day on most models (from $180)
- Battery & Charging Repairs — battery replacements and charging port rebuilds (from $120)
- Liquid Spill & Water Damage — ultrasonic board cleaning and data recovery (from $150)
- Slow Laptop / SSD Upgrade — SSD swap and clean Windows install to bring old laptops back to life (from $160)
- Won't Turn On / No Boot — full diagnostic, motherboard-level repair, data recovery (diagnostic $80)
- Keyboard & Hinge Repair — keys, hinges, palm rests replaced with quality parts (from $140)
- Data Recovery — available on water damage and no-boot repairs
- Insurance Reports — written damage assessments for home contents and business claims (1–2 business days)

## Brands Serviced

Dell, HP, Lenovo, Apple MacBook (Air & Pro), ASUS, Acer, MSI, Microsoft Surface, Toshiba, Samsung — and most other laptop brands.

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- No appointment needed — walk-ins welcome
- Flat $80 diagnostic fee, credited toward repair cost if you proceed
- Same-day turnaround on most screens, batteries and SSD upgrades
- Warranty included on all parts and workmanship
- Serves Midland, Guildford, Bassendean, Bayswater, Beechboro, Ellenbrook, Swan View, Helena Valley, High Wycombe, Kalamunda and surrounding Perth suburbs
- Also handles second hand and refurbished laptops

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.midlandlaptoprepairs.com.au/): Full site — services, brands, why us, customer reviews, FAQ, and contact
